debug_info.goal:
X : Type u
inst✝³ : DiffeologicalSpace X
inst✝² : AddCommGroup X
inst✝¹ : Module ℝ X
inst✝ : IsFineDiffeology ℝ X
x v w : X
h :
  @DFunLike.coe (Eucl 1 →ₗ[ℝ] @InternalTangentSpace X inst✝³ x) (Eucl 1) (fun x_1 => @InternalTangentSpace X inst✝³ x)
      LinearMap.instFunLike
      (@InternalTangentSpace.lof X inst✝³ x
        ⟨⟨1, fun t => x + t.ofLp 0 • v⟩, @vectorSpaceToInternalTangentSpace._proof_2 X inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ ⋯ ⋯ x v⟩)
      (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
    @DFunLike.coe (Eucl 1 →ₗ[ℝ] @InternalTangentSpace X inst✝³ x) (Eucl 1) (fun x_1 => @InternalTangentSpace X inst✝³ x)
      LinearMap.instFunLike
      (@InternalTangentSpace.lof X inst✝³ x
        ⟨⟨1, fun t => x + t.ofLp 0 • w⟩, @vectorSpaceToInternalTangentSpace._proof_2 X inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ ⋯ ⋯ x w⟩)
      (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1)
⊢ v = w

failed_attempts:
by_contra hne
  have hsub : v - w ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hne
  sorry

by_contra hne
  exact absurd h (by
    intro heq
    apply hne
    have : ∀ u : X, fderiv ℝ (fun t : Eucl 1 ↦ x + t 0 • u) 0 (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) = u := by
      intro u
      have hd : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun t : Eucl 1 ↦ x + t 0 • u) 0 := by
        apply DifferentiableAt.add (differentiableAt_const _)
        apply DifferentiableAt.smul
        · exact (EuclideanSpace.proj (𝕜 := ℝ) 0).differentiableAt
        · exact differentiableAt_const _
      rw [fderiv_add_const, fderiv_smul (EuclideanSpace.proj (𝕜 := ℝ) 0).differentiableAt]
      simp [EuclideanSpace.proj, ContinuousLinearMap.fderiv]
    rw [this v, this w] at heq
    exact heq)

have hsub : vectorSpaceToInternalTangentSpace x (v - w) = 0 := by
    simp [vectorSpaceToInternalTangentSpace, h, sub_self]
  sorry
